protocol.input: fixed C-LEG3 old_exact_080_regime response matrix, normal_k=4, anom_k=16 unless overridden
protocol.architecture: no-position scalar response-entry Set/Transformer reader; z_v is pooled contextual token representation
protocol.loss: ROCC = known-normal compactness + trimmed majority-unlabeled compactness + light anti-collapse variance floor
protocol.selection: label-free monitor only; diagnostic AUC/AP forbidden for checkpoint or hyperparameter selection
protocol.diagnostics: AUC/AP, Spearman/top-K overlap with mat_mean/margin, and reference purity are post-training diagnostic-only

r0_mean_lr1e3.definition: No-PE scalar-entry Set/Transformer reader, mean pooling, ROCC, AdamW lr=1e-3.

r0_mean_lr3e4.definition: No-PE scalar-entry Set/Transformer reader, mean pooling, ROCC, lower AdamW lr=3e-4.

r0_attn_lr1e3.definition: No-PE scalar-entry Set/Transformer reader, attention pooling without positional identity, ROCC, AdamW lr=1e-3.

cleg3_reference_definition.definition: Legacy GT-3 reproduction: hop_attr descriptor, PCA-residual normal model, labeled-normal normal references, normal_soft_or anomaly scoring, descriptor-similarity anomaly references, GT_num_layers=3, full anomaly candidate pool.

results.definition: No-PE scalar-entry Set/Transformer reader, mean pooling, ROCC, AdamW lr=1e-3.

rows.definition: No-PE scalar-entry Set/Transformer reader, mean pooling, ROCC, AdamW lr=1e-3.

protocol.position_encoding: none; scalar response-entry value only; global scalar normalization from known normals
protocol.training_labels: known-normal nodes only; all non-known-normal nodes treated as unlabeled for trimmed majority-normal ROCC
protocol.selection_rule: best checkpoint by label-free ROCC monitor, never by diagnostic AUC/AP
protocol.diagnostic_labels: AUC/AP, reference purity, and baseline comparisons are computed after training only

rows.definition: No-PE scalar-entry Set/Transformer reader, mean pooling, ROCC, AdamW lr=1e-3.
